---
title: "Memoirs of the lives and characters of the Right Honourable George Baillie of Jerviswood, and of Lady Grisell Baillie"
---

## Memoirs of the lives and characters of the Right Honourable George Baillie of Jerviswood, and of Lady Grisell Baillie

**Author:** Lady Grisell Baillie
**Date:** 1821
**Imprint:** Edinburgh: privately printed

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
